examples.title: Algorithm: Pointer Basics
examples.code:
ALGORITHM PointerBasics
INPUT: array, size
OUTPUT: modified array

BEGIN
 DECLARE pointer to array
 SET pointer to first element of array
 FOR i FROM 0 TO size-1
 PRINT value at pointer
 INCREMENT pointer
 END FOR
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates basic pointer operations such as declaration, assignment, and incrementation.
